videos.title: Ski To Sun Marathon Cross-country Ski Race 2019
videos.description: Enjoy scenes from the Methow Valley Nordic and Methow Trails Ski to Sun Marathon Race in January 26th, 2019.  40 kilometer marathon and relay race through the scenic Methow Valley.

videos.title: Ski To The Sun 2020
videos.description:
Short film of scenes of the Ski to the Sun Marathon and Relay race in the Methow Valley.  Sponsored by the Methow Trails and Methow Valley Nordic Ski Education Foundation.

Directed by Mike Tuggy

Videography:
Mike Tuggy - Aerial
Kathy Tuggy
Annette Frahm
Sally Kentch
Larry Mauksch

Music: Licensed from Artlist.io

www.telegraphixstudios.com

videos.title: Ski To Sun 2023
videos.description: The Ski to the Sun Marathon - in the Methow Valley of North Central Washington state.  Here is the story of this race that ran on February 11th, 2023.  Incredible day with perfect racing conditions.

videos.title: Ski To the Sun 2022 - Final Version
videos.description:
Hosted by the Methow Trails and Methow Valley Nordic Skiing Educational Foundation, this marathon length race stretches the length of the Methow Valley from Mazama up to Sun Mountain.  41+ km with a rigorous uphill the last 10 kilometers.

Filmed and edited in under 12 hours.  
Telegraphix Studios in Winthrop, Washington

videos.title: Antoine Cyr on his way to 12th World Jr. Championships 10k cl. Goms, Switzerland,
World Loppet Cross-country Ski Trailer
videos.description:
Preview Saul's upcoming documentary about World Loppet.
World Loppet is a series of Marathon distance cross-country ski races set in various countrys around the world. This preview is set in Italy, France and Germay.
